goal: 给 E:/Work/Cooki/ClaudeCode/knowledge-base 做一个 Web 知识管理系统，仅本地运行，不考虑认证。要求：浏览所有 markdown 文档，支持目录和标签导航，类似维基百科的双向链接跳转，全文搜索，以及简单的文档编辑能力。代码输出到 E:/Work/Cooki/ClaudeCode/knowledge-base/web/ 目录

tree.description: Build the HTML shell, CSS layout, and JS routing/navigation framework for the SPA

children.description: Create index.html with SPA shell structure including sidebar container, content area, hamburger toggle, and script/style includes from /static/ prefix
Build responsive CSS layout with sidebar + main content columns, hamburger menu collapse below 768px, base typography, and tree/nav styling
Create static/css/style.css with CSS reset, base typography (font-family, font-size, line-height, color), and html/body full-height setup
Add flexbox layout with #sidebar (fixed 260px width) and #content (flex:1) columns, overflow scrolling on both panels
Add @media (max-width: 768px) query that hides #sidebar by default, shows .hamburger toggle button, and adds .sidebar-open class to reveal sidebar as overlay
Add styles for .tree-node (indent, hover, cursor), .nav-link (sidebar navigation items), and .error-state (centered message with icon placeholder)
Implement hash router with #tree, #tags, #search, #doc/:path routes, deep-linking support, navigateTo() API, fetchTree() sidebar loader, and graceful API error handling
Create static/css/style.css with base layout: sidebar + main content two-column grid, base typography, and #sidebar/#content container styles
Add responsive styles: hamburger menu button, sidebar collapse below 768px breakpoint, and .tree-node/.nav-link styling
Create static/index.html with SPA shell: #sidebar container, #content area, hamburger toggle button, and script/style includes from /static/ prefix
Create static/js/app.js with minimal hash router: listen to hashchange, parse hash into {view, param} object, dispatch to placeholder render functions for tree/tags/search/doc views
Implement fetchTree() that calls GET /api/tree, renders nested directory tree in #sidebar with clickable links that navigate to #doc/:path
Add graceful API error states: if fetchTree() or doc fetch fails, show user-friendly error message in #sidebar and #content respectively instead of blank page
Wire hamburger button click to toggle sidebar visibility class for mobile responsive behavior

tree.description: Implement document viewer with rendered HTML, metadata panel, tag chips, and bidirectional link sections (backlinks + outgoing links)
Build tag navigation page (all tags with counts, click to filter docs) and full-text search with live results showing snippets
Add document editing capability with a raw markdown textarea, live preview toggle, and save via PUT /api/doc
Add Flask route to serve the static frontend files and configure app to serve index.html as the SPA entry point
End-to-end smoke test: start the server, verify all API endpoints return valid data and the frontend loads and navigates correctly
